arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Christoph Freund talks shattered dreams, depth at striker
arts.sum: Like many fans of the club, Bayern Munich sporting director Christoph Freund lamented the broken dreams that came along with being eliminated from the Champions League by Inter Milan . We have a big goal for the next few weeks: to win back the Bundesliga title.”

arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany backs Bayern Munich’s Jonas Urbig to deliver
arts.sum: Bayern Munich head coach Vincent Kompany thinks the young goalkeeper is up to the task. Neuer will return soon enough, but until that happens, Bayern Munich is in good hands with Urbig.

arts.ttl: Saturday's Bundesliga predictions including Heidenheim vs. Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Bundesliga fixtures, including Heidenheim vs. Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Daily Schmankerl: Bayern Munich might have to appease Dayot Upamecano’s salary requirements; Bayern confident in pursuit of Florian Wirtz; Inter Milan’s Alessandro Bastoni talks feeling of taking down Bayern; Arsenal out on striker; and MORE!
arts.sum: Inter Milan defender Alessandro Bastoni — a one-time Bayern Munich transfer target — talked through the elation of taking down the Bavarians: Let’s talk about some of the biggest issues facing Bayern Munich on this edition of the Bavarian Podcast Works — Weekend Warm-up Show:

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich boss Vincent Kompany offers message of hope to squad
arts.sum: After Bayern Munich ’s elimination at the hands of Inter Milan in the Champions League, head coach Vincent Kompany offered a message of hope to the team per Sport Bild journalists Christian Falk and Tobi Altschäffl (via @iMiaSanMia ): Looking for more thoughts and analysis of Bayern Munich 2-2 draw with Inter Milan in the Champions League that saw the Bavarians eliminated from the competition on an aggregate score of 4-3?

arts.ttl: Bavarian Loan Works: Heidenheim boss on Bayern loanees — “I want them to find a good mix of aggression and showing what they’re capable of”
arts.sum: When asked if the two loanees are motivated to face their parent club this weekend, Heidenheim coach, Frank Schmidt, said the following, “They shouldn’t belittle themselves. The motivation that he is looking from the young loanees is not due to the club they are facing this weekend, but because they currently sit in 16th place — which would put them in the relegation playoff — with just two points ahead of 17th place and automatic relegation.

arts.ttl: Breaking: Bayern Munich’s Leon Goretzka will miss Heidenheim game with calf issue
arts.sum: Per a release from Bayern Munich ’s club website, midfielder Leon Goretzka will be out for the Heidenheim match with a calf issue: FC Bayern will be without Leon Goretzka in the Bundesliga away match at 1.

arts.ttl: Report: Thomas Müller is “the priority target for MLS clubs”; has also received enquiries from the Premier League, Serie A
arts.sum: MLS has been linked to Müller in the past and, if a report from BILD is to be believed, via @iMiaSanMia, the league will unite its’ strength to bring the 2014 World Cup winner to America: It was decided that Thomas Müller would be the priority target for MLS clubs.
Kim Min-jae could reportedly be on the move in the summer, with a number of clubs keeping tabs on him.

arts.ttl: The numbers behind Inter’s incredible Champions League semi-final berth after moving past Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Although this year’s campaign has been rather strange quite frankly given the lack of consistency, coach Simone Inzaghi’s Inter side never ceases to amaze as Lautauro Martinez’s ruthless strike and…
